title: OptiCore Enhanced
description: OptiCore is a comprehensive, high-performance optimization plugin for Minecraft servers that intelligently manages resources and prevents lag through automated systems and real-time monitoring.
body:
# OptiCore - Advanced Server Optimization Suite

## OptiCore is a comprehensive, high-performance optimization plugin for Minecraft servers that intelligently manages resources and prevents lag through automated systems and real-time monitoring. Built specifically for Spigot/Paper servers, it combines powerful optimization tools with detailed analytics to maintain optimal server performance even under extreme conditions.

# Core Features:

## 🔧 Smart Entity Management

• Dynamic entity limits per chunk with type-specific thresholds

• Intelligent item cleanup prioritizing valuable items and named/tamed entities

• Experience orb merging and mob spawn control

• Configurable entity tracking ranges and cleanup intervals


## 🗑️ Advanced Item Cleanup

• Performance-based cleanup system with configurable thresholds

• Value-based item protection system

• Fast-cleanup items list for quick optimization

• Age-based removal with server load consideration


## 🌍 Intelligent Chunk Management

• World-specific chunk loading settings

• Protected worlds and spawn areas

• Aggressive optimization mode for specific worlds

• Smart chunk unloading algorithms


## ⚡ Redstone Optimization

• Component-specific limits per chunk

• Hopper optimization during low TPS

• Redstone update delay system

• Advanced component tracking


## 📊 Real-Time Performance Monitoring

• Live TPS tracking with historical data

• Memory usage monitoring and alerts

• Entity and chunk count statistics

• Performance score calculation

• Trend analysis and recommendations


## 🚨 Emergency Response System

• Force garbage collection

• Cache clearing

• World unloading

• Spawn control

• Automatic recovery procedures


# Admin Tools:

## 📱 User Interface

• Beautiful, color-coded status messages

• Action bar notifications

• Title messages for important alerts

• Formatted console output


## ⚙️ Configuration

• Extensive config.yml options

• World-specific settings

• Customizable thresholds and limits

• Module toggles


## 📈 Analytics Dashboard

• Performance overview

• Trend insights

• Resource usage statistics

• Optimization history


# Commands:

• /opticore dashboard - Real-time performance overview

• /opticore optimize - Manual cleanup and optimization

• /opticore analytics - Detailed performance insights

• /opticore reload - Reload configuration


# Perfect For:

• High-performance servers requiring constant optimization

• Networks with multiple worlds and complex setups

• Servers experiencing entity or redstone-related lag

• Administrators seeking proactive performance management

• Communities needing automated resource optimization


# Technical Requirements:

• Java 17 or higher

• Paper/Spigot 1.18.2+

• 2GB+ RAM recommended


# OptiCore combines powerful optimization tools with detailed analytics to create a comprehensive solution for server performance management. Whether you're running a small community server or a large network, OptiCore provides the tools needed to maintain optimal performance and prevent lag spikes.
